name: heroku-session-bot
description: A Telegram bot that updates the SESSION_ID config variable on a target Heroku app via the Heroku Platform API.

BOT_TOKEN.description: Your Telegram bot token obtained from @BotFather.

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: Your Heroku API key. Find it at https://dashboard.heroku.com/account under 'API Key'.

TARGET_APP_NAME.description: The exact name of the Heroku app whose SESSION_ID config var this bot will update.

ADMIN_CHAT_ID.description: The Telegram chat/user ID of the only person allowed to use this bot. Send /id to the bot to discover your ID.
